steps.description:
<runtime> `gather-inputs` with `since=<prep.window_start>`. The composed
formula returns the standard envelope; treat the directive in this step
body as opaque text from bd's perspective — only AI-interpretive
runtimes recognize and dispatch on it at execution time.
steps.title: Gather via runtime-dispatched sub-formula
